# forward[T9] = With[{T923=T9^(2/3),T932=T9^(3/2),T913=T9^(1/3),T943=T9^(4/3),T953=T9^(5/3)},(1.668*^+15/T923*Exp[-31.272/T913-(T9/.307)^2]* (1.+1.33*^-2*T913-6.42*T923-.599*T9+14.4*T943+3.42*T953)+56.8/T932*Exp[-5.292/T9]+1.7*^+5/T932*Exp[-14.08/T9]+6.52*^7/T932*Exp[-23.09/T9])]   uncertainty factor f = 3
